mapper.insert: /* 감사: 로그 기록 */ INSERT INTO AUDIT_LOG (USR_SN, AUD_LOG_TYPE_CD, AUD_LOG_REF_TYPE_CD, AUD_LOG_REF_SN, AUD_LOG_RSON_CN, AUD_LOG_IP_ADDR) VALUES (#{usrSn}, #{audLogTypeCd}, #{audLogRefTypeCd}, #{audLogRefSn}, #{audLogRsonCn}, #{audLogIpAddr})
mapper.select: /* 감사: 채팅 메시지 원문 제한 조회 (읽기 전용) */ SELECT M.CH_MSG_SN AS chMsgSn, M.CH_RM_SN AS chRmSn, M.USR_SN AS usrSn, U.USR_NM AS usrNm, M.CH_MSG_CN AS chMsgCn, M.CH_MSG_REG_DT AS chMsgRegDt FROM CHAT_MESSAGE M LEFT JOIN USERS U ON U.USR_SN = M.USR_SN WHERE M.CH_MSG_SN = #{chMsgSn}
